zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bardolf於1312年1月13日出生在英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳時，她的父親Sir Thomas Bardolf II29歲，母親Agnes de Grandison23歲。她於1327年與Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles在英國諾福爾可喬加結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年3月28日之前在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Bardolf于1312年1月13日出生在英国諾福爾可金也斯 琳时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Bardolf II29岁，母亲Agnes de Grandison23岁。她于1327年与Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles在英国諾福爾可喬加结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年3月28日之前在英国英格兰林可爾史爾，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bardolf was born on 13 January 1312, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, was 29 and her mother, Agnes de Grandison, was 23. She married Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles in 1327, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died before 28 March 1345, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bardolf est née le 13 janvier 1312, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Grandison, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles en 1327, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 28 mars 1345, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bardolf am 13. Januar 1312 in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Bardolf II 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Grandison 23. Sie hat 1327 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 28. März 1345 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bardolf è nata il il 13 gennaio 1312 nel King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Grandison, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles nel 1327, nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 28 marzo 1345, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bardolfが1312年1月13日にイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bardolf IIは29歳，母Agnes de Grandisonは23歳であった。1327年にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイでAdam de Welles 3rd Lord Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年3月28日以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bardolf(이)가 1312년 1월 13일 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Bardolf II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Grandison(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 3월 28일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

mn.13 Jan 1312–Bef 28 March 1345: 1312 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 13–1345 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 28–наас өмнө

pt.13 Jan 1312–Bef 28 March 1345: 13 de janeiro de 1312–antes 28 de março de 1345
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bardolf nasceu em 13 de janeiro de 1312, em King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Grandison, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles em 1327, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 28 de março de 1345, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bardolf родилась 13 января 1312 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Bardolf II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Grandison, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles в 1327 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 28 марта 1345 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.

es.13 Jan 1312–Bef 28 March 1345: 13 de enero de 1312–antes de 28 de marzo de 1345
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Bardolf nació el 13 de enero de 1312, en King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes de Grandison, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles en 1327, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 28 de marzo de 1345, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
